description:
PyCalc - SE is a Simpler GUI Version of PyCalc consisting of the Basic Calculator!



This is the Fourth Release of PyCalc-SE!

Release Notes :

- [ MAIN UPDATE ] Overhauled the a Windows Installer with Foreign Language Support, a Version Number [ Winget Fix ] and other Installer related Stuff!
- New Logo for the App!

Installation and Requirements :

- Any system with Python installed.
- Requires customtkinter package to be installed via pip.
- No Python installation needed if using Installer or PyCalc-SE.exe on Windows Systems or PyCalc-SE file on Linux Systems!

Source code is given as a .zip file. Feel free to make Forks and expand its capabilities!
